name: ZYNP Corporation
summary: ZYNP Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, tests, and supplies cylinder liners and power piston assembly systems in China and internationally. The company provides engine parts, automotive electronics, smart driving products, and smart equipment, as well as international trade services. It offers cylinder liners for the passenger car, commercial vehicle, construction machinery, agricultural machinery, shipbuilding, garden machinery, air compressor, military, and other power fields. The company primarily serves OEMs. ZYNP Corporation was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Mengzhou, China.
